name: Cranberry-Pecan Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Butter and flour a 2 1/2-quart tube pan or two 8-1/2 x 4-1/2-inch loaf pans.
3. Place pecans on a baking sheet and bake until lightly colored, about 10 minutes. Cool.
4. Coarsely chop cranberries.
5. Using a mixer, beat sugar and butter until light and fluffy. Beat in eggs one at a time.
6. Beat in sour cream, then liqueur, vanilla, and orange peel.
7. Stir together flours and salt. Add dry ingredients to egg mixture gradually, stopping when all flour has been incorporated.
8. Fold in pecans and cranberries.
9. Pour batter into prepared pans. Tap pan on the counter to release air bubbles.
10. Bake loaves for 45 minutes; tube cake about 1 hour. Cool for 10 minutes before removing from pan(s).
11. Wrap and refrigerate at least 1 day and up to 3 days.
12. Dust with powdered sugar.
